name: Avidia Bancorp, Inc.
business: Avidia Bancorp, Inc., through its subsidiary Avidia Bank, is a Massachusetts-chartered stock savings bank that provides traditional banking services, including deposits and loans, to individuals and businesses in its primary market area of western Middlesex and eastern Worcester counties in Massachusetts. Additionally, it offers nationwide payments processing services for small business merchants and other payment processing entities, as well as Health Savings Accounts (HSAs) through its Avidia Health program.
sellsTo: Individuals and businesses in western Middlesex and eastern Worcester counties, Massachusetts
Small business merchants and payment processing entities nationwide

exposures.sentence: In addition to our core banking business, since 2000 we have engaged in payments processing activities, serving small business merchants and other payment processing entities nationwide.
As part of our deposit taking activities, through our Avidia Health program, we offer Health Savings Accounts (HSAs) nationwide.
At December 31, 2025, solar plant loans totaled $103.5 million.

catalysts.event: Completion of conversion from mutual to stock form of organization and IPO
catalysts.sentence: the Conversion, which was completed on July 31, 2025, the Company sold 19,176,250 shares of common stock at a price of $10.00 per share and contributed 900,000 shares of common stock and $1.0 million in cash to the Avidia Bank Charitable Foundation, Inc.
In January 2026 we also declared our first quarterly cash dividend to common shareholders at $0.05 per share.
